problem id: 626a2762
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) AND NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  11000110 -> 10000001
  00101101 -> 00000011
  11111110 -> 00001111
  01001011 -> 10000010
  01011000 -> 00010110
  00110010 -> 00001100
  11000010 -> 10100000
  00100011 -> 11000000
  00000100 -> 00000001

query: 00110111
predicted answer: 01000101
